payload.answer: SQL debug access is disabled, so the /brain admin sql command cannot be executed. No memory cards were read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command request, not a durable user memory. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Rejected admin SQL execution because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate debug environment before retrying the admin SQL command.
Use a supported non-SQL Brain inspection command if available.
Request a normal memory lookup rather than direct SQL access.
